# AI Project Workflow CatPaw Adapter

Before starting a task, read `AGENTS.md`, `core/rules/`, `core/skills/<stage>/SKILL.md`, and `.ai-workflow/state.json` from the project root.
Keep the stage command convention: `/init`, `/prd`, `/hld`, `/sdd`, `/impl`, `/review`, `/deploy`, and `/retro`.
This file is a lightweight entry point. The canonical source is `core/`.
